summary:
Infrastructure compliance escalation — explicit control failure detail for client remediation.
NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 (NIST-CSF-2.0) control PR.AA.01 — Identities and credentials are managed: non-conformant. Triggered by: rule identity-mfa-enrollment; expected "100% of users enrolled in MFA", observed "72% enrolled"; entity /subscriptions/sub-contoso-prod-001/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/identity-mfa-enforcement
ISO/IEC 27001 (ISO-27001) control A.9.2.1 — User registration and de-registration: non-conformant. Triggered by: rule identity-mfa-enrollment; expected "100% of users enrolled in MFA", observed "72% enrolled"; entity /subscriptions/sub-contoso-prod-001/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/identity-mfa-enforcement

triggeredBy.expected: 100% of active-eligible users enrolled in MFA within 30 days
triggeredBy.observed: 72% aggregate enrolled (28% user-account-created excluded from risk denominator)

triggeredBy.expected: 100% of active-eligible users enrolled in MFA within 30 days
triggeredBy.observed: 72% aggregate enrolled (28% user-account-created excluded from risk denominator)

mitigationPlan.requirementTitle: Mandatory MFA for all privileged and standard users
acceptanceCriteria: 100% of users enrolled in MFA within 30 days
Privileged roles use JIT elevation with maximum 4-hour sessions
Guest users blocked from administrative roles
Conditional access policies enforce compliant device state

vendorDeliverableProfile.summary: Microsoft Entra ID and Conditional Access must deliver MFA for all users, JIT for privileged roles, guest restrictions, and compliant-device enforcement per approved parameters.

clientActions.title: 100% of users enrolled in MFA within 30 days
clientActions.description: Restore compliance for monitoring rule "identity-mfa-enrollment". Target state: 100% of users enrolled in MFA. Current observed state: 72% enrolled. Apply remediation template: identity-access-control.

mitigationPlan.requirementTitle: Mandatory MFA for all privileged and standard users
acceptanceCriteria: 100% of users enrolled in MFA within 30 days
Privileged roles use JIT elevation with maximum 4-hour sessions
Guest users blocked from administrative roles
Conditional access policies enforce compliant device state

vendorDeliverableProfile.summary: Microsoft Entra ID and Conditional Access must deliver MFA for all users, JIT for privileged roles, guest restrictions, and compliant-device enforcement per approved parameters.

clientCheckValidation.checkValidationDescription: New User onboarding and MFA registration requirements are in effect to the clients premises but the account creation and the user actually registering a device takes time. The user is however unable to login to the system without a MFA registration and will be prompted to ensure the MFA device registration does take place prior to access to the systems.

clientDisposition.notes: New User onboarding and MFA registration requirements are in effect to the clients premises but the account creation and the user actually registering a device takes time. The user is however unable to login to the system without a MFA registration and will be prompted to ensure the MFA device registration does take place prior to access to the systems.
